creator: freebsd@dreamchaser.org
text:
If you manually adjust the luminosity curve in ufraw for Image1 and then save that adjustment curve, the curve parameters appear in the .ufraw file for that image only.  There is no reference to the curve parameters or the .curve file in the ~/.ufrawrc file.

If you then process the same or another image and apply the previously saved curve, the curve parameters together with the terminal file name (no path) are saved to the .ufrawrc file.

Any successive applications of the saved .curve file to the any image will add an additional entry for the same curve to the ~/.ufrawrc file and a duplicate entry to the curve drop-down.

The same thing happens when changing/loading the base tone curve.

In a similar fashion, if you load an already existing color correction curve you get two entries in the drop-down and an additional (duplicate) entry in the .ufrawrc file.
